concerns.text: Success Criterion SC-003 states the I² value is measured against the Reference Benchmark Dataset with an expected value of `[deferred]`, but Functional Requirement FR-004 mandates that the pre‑flight benchmark must produce I² = 55.0% within 1e‑6 tolerance. The deferred placeholder contradicts the exact numeric expectation, creating an unresolvable conflict between measurement expectations.

Multiple acceptance scenarios and requirement texts reference identifiers US-1, US-2, and US-3 (e.g., “(see US-1)”, “pipeline transitions to reporting phase (US-3)”), but no User Story or section with those IDs is defined anywhere in the document, leaving cross‑references unresolved.
The same undefined reference issue appears for US-2 in FR-003 and SC-002, where the text cites “(See US-2)” without a corresponding definition.
US-3 is referenced in several acceptance scenarios (e.g., User Story 1 scenario 3) and in success criteria, yet no User Story or section labeled US-3 exists, breaking traceability.
